title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. calcifugiens
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. calcifugiens, also known as the limestone marsh orchid, is a sub-species of the Dactylorhiza majalis orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid that thrives in areas with alkaline soils. The medicinal properties of this plant have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. calcifugiens include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
